subject: You won't get hired without this...
Is there an objective way to trade options?
snippet: Dear Sincere Trader, This is the candlestick chart of Nifty 26000 PE. Now, what if we charted this in Point & Figure – a noiseless chart Just one glance at the second chart and it is clear how
body:
Options Trading, the Objective Way
[https://img.mmdocdn.com/mailmodo/image/upload/ar_600:309,c_crop/v1771921551/editor/p/901f4bc1-283f-41b6-af1c-023f6d5ec0d7/3ba4074889561e90608fcb5bf77d597f_htjl3h.png]

Dear Sincere Trader,

Nifty 26000 PE Candlestick
[https://img.mmdocdn.com/mailmodo/image/upload/ar_560:318,c_crop/v1771921866/editor/p/901f4bc1-283f-41b6-af1c-023f6d5ec0d7/12fdd8f47671dbd58ff548846f48ead7_bug1xv.jpg]

This is the candlestick chart of Nifty 26000 PE.

 

Now, what if we charted this in Point & Figure – a noiseless chart

Nifty 26000 PE P&F
[https://img.mmdocdn.com/mailmodo/image/upload/ar_560:316,c_crop/v1771921880/editor/p/901f4bc1-283f-41b6-af1c-023f6d5ec0d7/441422e6673c9d8448e348f88b7de69d_qa0pog.jpg]

Just one glance at the second chart and it is clear how simple and noiseless it
is.

 

It was very clear that the PE chart initially was in an uptrend (which means,
Nifty was in a downtrend) and subsequently, the PE chart started a downtrend
(Nifty uptrend).

 

Now, if we look at the 26000 CE chart which is exactly opposite to the PE chart,
it also reveals the same thing. However, with a twist. 

Nifty 26000 CE P&F
[https://img.mmdocdn.com/mailmodo/image/upload/ar_560:316,c_crop/v1771922025/editor/p/901f4bc1-283f-41b6-af1c-023f6d5ec0d7/ea3ce130271e81aa87f3f8382ca85f4a_howzyz.jpg]

The PE chart was shouting NOT to be short and the ATM CE chart at that time
(25000 CE) suggested an uptrend 

Nifty 25000 CE P&F
[https://img.mmdocdn.com/mailmodo/image/upload/ar_560:316,c_crop/v1771922045/editor/p/901f4bc1-283f-41b6-af1c-023f6d5ec0d7/f1e37ff0ebe25abbaf2c7d4141efddfa_xqcl6c.jpg]

This is just one use of the Options charts – to form an objective market view 

 

The conventional method to trade Options is by using the pay-off graphs and
Greeks from OPSTRA.

 

However, we have developed a very objective method to look at Options by
actually plotting the Options charts – charts of the Options premium.

 

These charts on Point and Figure or Renko charting give  a very good objective
idea of where the underlying is headed.

 

This helps in 2 ways –  

 1. Actually getting a trade idea, or  
 2. Understanding where the underlying is headed (even if one wants to buy a
    cash stock).

 

lotting these Options charts is very simple and you only need to know the basics
of Point and Figure charting method. 

 

There are various ways to use Options charts to get objective trading ideas:
 

 1. Intra day long or short in Index / stock Options
 2. Positional long or short in index / stock options.
 3. Trading straddles or strangles shorts and also getting an idea if the
    underlying is trending or sideways.
 4.  Trading Debit spreads or Credit spreads.
 5.  Trading Covered calls against cash holding.
 6. Trading Iron Condors,

 

It is well known that one should not trade directional strategies in a sideways
market, and non-directional strategies in a trending market.

 

These charts tell you exactly how to identify a trending or sideways phase for
any underlying.

This is Objective Options Trading. 

In the coming weeks, we will share more such examples and insights with you.

 

So, keep an eye on your email.

Objectivity is Clarity

Best Regards, 

Team Definedge 

Built for Power Traders & Investors

Algostra by Definedge
[https://img.mmdocdn.com/mailmodo/image/upload/ar_1240:320,c_crop/v1772634949/editor/p/901f4bc1-283f-41b6-af1c-023f6d5ec0d7/d91faf3510be774bdbd9963b1279d4f2_cjpoxm.png]https://i.definedge.in/objoptalgo

subject: Invest today in top 50 dividend leaders of India!
snippet: Dear Customer, What is your investments could aim for growth with no long term capital gain tax * ? Introducing the ICICI Pru Dividend Leaders 50 Index Fund in ICICI Pru Smart Insurance plan plus (SIP+
body:
ICICI Pru Smart Insurance plan plus (SIP+) plan
    


    
    
    
    

    






    
        


            
                
                    

                        

                        
                        
                        

                        
                        
                        

                        
                        
                        
                        

                        
                        
                         


                         
                        
                            Dear Customer,


                            What is your investments could aim for growth with no long term capital gain tax*?

                            Introducing the ICICI Pru Dividend Leaders 50 Index Fund
 in ICICI Pru Smart Insurance plan plus (SIP+).

                            This fund is built around companies that have a proven history of paying dividends consistently and have resilient business fundamentals.

                        
                        




                        
                        
                        
                        

                        


                        
                        
                          
                        
 
                        
                        
                        

                      






                        
                        
                        

                        
                        

          






                         
                
                    

                        
                            
                                
                                    


                                     
                                        Product brochure
                                    

                                     
                                       Learn more aboutICICI Pru Smart Insurance Plan Plus (SIP+)

                                    
                                
                            

                            
                                

                                    

                                    Know your fund

Learn more about
                                    
                                    
ICICI Pru Dividend leaders 50 Index Fund
 
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                    
                    
                    
                

            


                        
                        
                        
                        

                        
                        
                        
                        

                        
                        
                        
                        

                        
                        Get free assistance


                        For any queries related to the plan or online purchase process, please
                        Call us on 1800 209 9777
 Call centre hours: 9.00 a.m. - 9.00 p.m., all days.
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        

                        
                        
                        
                        


                        
                        
                        

                        
                         


                        

                        
                        
                        

                         

                       




                        
URisk factors and warning statements

                         i. Linked insurance products/ annuity products with variable pay-out options are different from traditional insurance products and are subject to the risk factors.


                         ii. The premium paid in linked insurance policies or the annuity offered under the annuity policies with variable annuity pay-out option are subject to investment risks associated with capital markets and publicly available index. The annuity amount/NAVs of the unis may go up or down based on the performance of fund and factors influencing the capital market/ publicly available index and the insured is responsible for his/her decisions.


                         iii. ICICI Prudential Life Insurance in only the name of the Life Insurance Company and ICICI Pru Smart Insurance Plan Plus (SIP+) is only the name of the linked insurance contract and does not in anyway indicate the quality of the contract, its future prospects or returns.


                         iv. Please know the associated risks and the applicable charges, from your insurance agent or intermediary or policy document issued by the insu ance company.


                         v. The various funds offered under this contract are the names of the funds and do not in any way, indicate the quality of these plans, their future prospects and returns.


                         
*100% Tax-free Returns, tax-free partial withdrawals and No LTCG (Long Term Capital Gains) under the policy are subject to satisfaction of conditions prescribed u/s 10(10D) of the Income Tax Act, 1961. Policies issued on or after February 01, 2021 where aggregate premium (including top-up premiums and rider premiums) payable during the term of the policy/policies in respect of Unit linked life insurance policies more than ₹2.5 lakh per year per person is not exempt u/s 10(10D). Tax benefits/tax-free returns under the policy are subject to conditions under Sections 80C, 10(10D), 115BAC and
other provisions of the Income Tax Act, 1961. Goods and Services tax is exempt on Individual Life Insurance Policies issued/premiums due on or after September 22, 2025. Applicable taxes, if any will be charged as per prevailing rates. Tax laws are subject to amendments from time to time. Please consult your tax advisor for more details.


                         
                         
1Life cover is the benefit payable on death of the life assured during the policy term.

                         
2Switches are only applicable for fixed portfolio strategy and not applicable for other portfolio strategies.

                         

                         
!There are no premium allocation and policy administration charges in this product.

                         
4Asset under management as on Dec 31st, 2025 is as on the company website.

                         

                         
**ARR : Assumed Rate of Return. For the purpose of illustration, the Company has assumed 8% and 4% as rates of investment returns. The returns shown in the illustration are not guaranteed and they are not the upper or lower limits that you may get. As the value of the policy depends on a number of factors including future investment performance.






                        
^The Index returns for BSE 500 Dividend Leaders 50 Index are as on date 30th Jan 2026. Past performance is not indicative of future performance. Regulations may restrict us from investing in all the stocks in line with their weights in the index from time to time. As a result, there could be a possible tracking error.


                        
!!To check performance of other funds, visit https://panela.iciciprulife.com/vtrack?clientid=187546&ul=
Aw5TBAABAgcfVUgPCQsFX1oKA1dQFAdaB1QGeVdfUV9dS1YMWUoMAQsOAVpbAQMGGUwC&ml=BwhaAAEABUtTGAZRU1tQTQ==&sl=cEQgSnh+SGQuMEgSBw0BXVhMC1pdBQ8TRRFaUFZXHlVeCElT&pp=0&ga=utm_source%3DNC_GRP_SIP_EML%26utm_campaign%3DGRP_EML_SIP_NewDividend_1_Mar04%26utm_medium%3DGRP_SIP_EML%26utm_content%3DGRP_EML_SIP_NewDividend_1_Mar04%26utm_term%3DGRP_EML_SIP_NewDividend_1_Mar04&fl=WkwXRkIKGxgUE0NMDwANUlASEExYDwAGGQdZVB9HXF9BSEUPVVhGF0ZZXhdPXFtcDlVXHw9bFU1HU1haBB5IDVNWEBlTRU0aCgddAQ9OFENMTxFUVRQSTl4KRUxCU15VVEhFD1VYGEhfQkRNCkRfXg==&ext=VUlEPTU1MDAy

                          Reg. Off.: ICICI PruLife Towers, 1089 Appasaheb Marathe Marg, Prabhadevi, Mumbai 400025. Tel.: 40391600. Customer helpline number - 1800 2660. Timings : 10:00 A.M. to 7:00 P.M., Monday to Saturday (except national holidays). Member of the Life Insurance Council. For more details on the risk factors, term and conditions please read the product brochure carefully before concluding the sale. body: Hi There, The SDET position at Infosys is open — and this session shows you how to get there Join Live Now Bonus: Complete all workshop tasks to unlock your Trial Workshop Certificate 🎓 Right now, Naman Kapoor (Software Test Engineer – Automation @ Google; ex-Apple & Amazon) is breaking down: How Gen-AI + Automation helps you stand out (smarter test data, faster case design, flaky-test triage). The projects recruiters value: UI + API + DB , microservices integration , and CI/CD-ready suites. Why solid testers face silent rejections — and the small shifts (framework design, reporting, reliability) that change outcomes. How these skills connect directly to ₹10–20 LPA opportunities. ⚡ Don’t miss what’s already in motion. Seats are limited, and entry may close soon. Bonus: Complete all workshop tasks to unlock your Trial Workshop Certificate 🎓 👉 Attend now Happy learning, Shruthi Team Crio.do                                    Crio Is An Approved Training Partner      Of The National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC), India.
